reports.title: Runtime-aware SCA is becoming a practical wedge
reports.summary: Security tools that join advisory databases with observed runtime behavior can reduce noisy vulnerability queues for application teams.
reports.bodyMarkdown: Static scanners are still useful, but teams are asking which vulnerable packages are actually loaded, reachable, or exposed in production-like runs. The near-term product opportunity is a local-first triage layer that keeps evidence close to the developer workflow.

reports.title: Agent research workstations need source health, not just cards
reports.summary: A dense reader should surface run recency, stale data, source confidence, and cache state before asking users to trust a summary.
reports.bodyMarkdown: The useful pattern is a three-pane review loop: navigation on the left, a compressed queue in the center, and an evidence-heavy reader on the right. Native macOS chrome should stay calm while the content carries the editorial texture.

sourceHealth.name: Public Pages manifest
sourceHealth.note: Remote sync is not enabled in the skeleton.
